strategy.thesis: Buyers don’t lack listings — they lack timing. Casarico compresses the time between an agent’s decision to sell and the buyer knowing about it. We compete on information velocity and trusted relationships; search is the entry point, owning the transaction workflow is the goal.

promises.buyer: Find the next home before it’s publicly listed.
promises.swapper: Secure the next home before selling the current one.
promises.agent: Win additional seller mandates through qualified Swappers.

connect: Model — buyers pay activation + success fee; Swappers are free because their mandate is worth more.
Supply — early sharing must be economically rational for agents, never contractually forced.
Buy-back — conditional purchase certainty turns timing risk into a financial product.
Expansion — Geneva proves, Zurich validates portability, national only once the engine repeats.
North star — the operating system for residential moves: discovery, financing certainty, purchase, sale and orchestration in one workflow.

risks.mit: Conditional structure of buy-back, disciplined pilot

strategy.rule: Every choice should strengthen the flywheel of Swappers, proprietary supply, trusted execution and transaction ownership. Incremental revenue that dilutes this positioning is rejected.

initiatives.name: Pricing & business model reset
initiatives.summary: Buyers pay activation + success fee; Swappers stay free (their future mandate is worth more). Adjusted model live 1 August 2026 after the initial agent pricing created friction on the first transaction.

initiatives.name: Zurich market entry
initiatives.summary: Test of portability beyond Geneva. Cost per lead at parity (CHF 22.50) but Swapper share (37% vs 52%) and lead-to-client conversion (15% vs 54%) lag Geneva. Action plan agreed at board meeting #6.

initiatives.name: Off-market supply engine
initiatives.summary: Make early sharing economically rational for agents — never contractually forced. Only 4 true off-market properties so far; publication is a multi-touch, capacity-constrained process.

initiatives.name: SPV buy-back guarantee
initiatives.summary: Conditional purchase certainty on a Swapper’s current home via an SPV — turns timing uncertainty into a financial product. Key risks: capital requirements and interest-rate environment.

initiatives.name: Financing round
initiatives.summary: Bridge financing closed (contract + payment received). Main round in preparation.

initiatives.name: Automation & AI roadmap
initiatives.summary: AI automates operational work; humans stay at high-trust decision points. Workstreams: client onboarding, sales + improvement loop, matching management, marketing analytics, video ad creation.

initiatives.name: Immo-Ressource legacy business
initiatives.summary: License fees churning; keeping legacy customers happy is much harder than anticipated while all energy goes to Casarico. Direction to be decided at board meeting #6.

meetings.attendees: Daniel Abebe (Chairperson), Luca Fontanella, Nicola Haas

checkin.t: Year-closing 2025 + GV (close or schedule the GV)

agenda.t: Adjusted pricing & business model from 1 Aug

meetings.finNarrative: Q2 revenue grew ~30% on stable charges, halving the quarterly loss. The Q3 projection assumes lower revenue while the new pricing and free-Swapper model ramps.
wins: New user interface + AI workflows shipped

learnings.so: Revised pricing to remove friction on the first transaction.
Swappers are free from now on. July tests: free-signup campaign for buyers in Zurich; CHF 200 urgency discount in Geneva.
Cost per lead at Geneva level (CHF 22.50), but Swapper share (37% vs 52%) and lead→client conversion (15% vs 54%) lag Geneva.

learnings.what: Only 4 true off-market properties shared by agents
learnings.so: More leads pull focus from supply; publication takes several follow-ups — a capacity and process issue.
Harder than anticipated to keep legacy customers happy while all energy goes to Casarico.

ai.name: Client onboarding
ai.what: Qualify and activate buyers & Swappers without manual steps

ai.name: Sales + improvement loop
ai.what: Assist sales conversations and feed learnings back into the funnel

ai.name: Matching management
ai.what: Match buyers to (off-market) properties at scale

ai.name: Marketing analytics
ai.what: Attribute spend and steer campaigns (ZH vs GE)

meetings.notes: Q2 wins: 30 active Swappers + 35 active buyers; 14 partner companies onboarded; scraper accuracy & speed improved; new UI + AI workflows shipped.

highlights: Swappers are free from now on
“Sign up for free” campaign for buyers in Zurich
CHF 200 urgency discount tested in Geneva
reports.notes: Example entry seeded from board pack #6 — edit or delete.

tasks.text: Close year-closing 2025 and schedule the GV
